SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa.descriptor

Class SQLQueryBuilder

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.descriptor.SQLQueryBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
QueryBuilder
public class SQLQueryBuilder extends Object implements QueryBuilder
Builder class to generate the SQL Query. This class has specific APIs to generate SELECT and other queries required for database CRUD operation. The queries are generated once and stored in a local cache for future use.
Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda
